title: Concept Alabaster Blade Light Angel Portrait Variant
sourceTitle: Concept Alabaster Blade Light Angel Portrait Variant
prompt:
{
  "concept": "alabaster_blade_light_angel_portrait",
  "variant_of": "obsidian_blade_dark_angel_portrait — inverted high-key 'light angel' counterpart",
  "format": "single_frame_editorial_portrait",
  "aspect_ratio": "3:4",
  "render_target": "real high-fashion campaign photograph, NOT illustration or 3D render",

  "subject": {
    "type": "female_model",
    "identity_preservation": "high — preserve exact facial structure, real skin texture and natural features from the reference; do not idealize into a generic doll face",
    "pose": "dramatic editorial pose, head tilted and turned in three-quarter profile, eyes softly closed or downcast, one arm raised elegantly overhead, the other hand gripping a sword vertically before her",
    "expression": "serene, powerful, otherworldly calm",
    "gaze": "downcast, contemplative",
    "hair": "long sleek hair styled in a cool platinum-silver-to-ash tone, wet-look strands framing the face, flowing over the shoulders, individual flyaway strands catching the light",
    "skin_physics": "luminous porcelain skin with REAL texture — visible pores, fine peach-fuzz at the hairline, subsurface scattering glow under soft light; natural specular highlights on cheekbone, nose bridge and collarbone; NO plastic smoothing, NO airbrushed wax finish even though the lighting is bright"
  },

  "wardrobe": {
    "style": "avant-garde haute couture, luminous light-angel aesthetic",
    "garment": "voluminous white-and-silver feather couture gown — cascading layers of glossy ivory and pale-silver feathers and fringe forming sweeping wing-like volumes around the body",
    "fabric": "glossy ostrich plume and marabou feathers, faint pearlescent iridescent shimmer catching the cool light",
    "feather_physics": "correct overlapping feather layering with believable depth and self-shadowing; the volumes look genuinely soft and heavy with natural drape, NOT a flat painted texture, NOT a cheap costume",
    "color": "ivory white with cool silver sheen and faint pearl iridescence",
    "coverage": "fully covered, dramatic and modest — feathers envelop the form"
  },

  "prop": {
    "item": "a long ceremonial sword held vertically, blade pointing up",
    "material": "blade carved from clear quartz / white diamond / iced crystal — faceted, glassy, with sharp internal reflections, prismatic glints and a faint frosted sparkle, like cut clear gemstone or ice",
    "hilt": "matte brushed-silver or pale platinum hilt, minimal and elegant",
    "how_held": "gripped firmly in one hand, blade aligned vertically along the body, catching a thin edge of light",
    "hand_physics": "fingers wrap the hilt with correct anatomy and believable grip pressure — visible contact between fingertips and hilt, natural knuckle and tendon detail",
    "feel": "regal, ceremonial, mythic — not violent; a symbol of light, power and protection"
  },

  "jewelry": {
    "earring": "long sparkling clear-crystal drop earring with prismatic glints",
    "ring": "single sculptural silver ring on the raised hand"
  },

  "lighting": {
    "key": "soft directional studio light, cool and cinematic, camera-right — high-key but controlled, never blown out",
    "fill": "soft even fill that keeps shadow detail in the white feathers, preserving feather-to-feather separation (no flat white blob)",
    "accent": "thin rim light tracing the crystal blade's facets so they glint and refract; subtle highlight on cheekbone and collarbone",
    "highlight_protection": "guard against over-exposure — retain texture in the brightest whites of skin and feathers, hold detail in highlights",
    "mood": "luminous high-fashion chiaroscuro, ethereal and divine",
    "coherence": "all shadows fall consistently with the single camera-right key; blade glints and skin highlights match the same light vector"
  },

  "color_palette": {
    "dominant": "ivory white, pale silver, soft pearl-grey feathers",
    "accent": "cool glassy clear-diamond sparkle, prismatic silver glints",
    "skin": "luminous porcelain, softly lit with warm undertone retained so it doesn't read corpse-pale",
    "background": "seamless cool light-grey gradient (#E4E4E8 to #CFCFD4), studio backdrop"
  },

  "composition": {
    "framing": "portrait, head to mid-torso, with feather volumes filling the frame and the vertical blade as a strong central line",
    "depth_of_field": "shallow, f/2.2 — tack-sharp on face, hand, and blade facets; soft feather falloff",
    "negative_space": "soft light-grey breathing room in the upper-right"
  },

  "camera": {
    "lens": "85mm portrait equivalent, medium-format fashion look",
    "aperture": "f/2.2",
    "iso": 100,
    "focus": "critical sharpness on eyes, gripping hand and blade facets"
  },

  "aesthetic": {
    "direction": "spectral surrealism meets light-angel couture editorial, mythic and cinematic",
    "references": ["Vogue luminous editorial", "sculptural feather couture", "cinematic film still", "ethereal warrior-goddess portraiture"],
    "film_emulation": "subtle fine grain, clean true whites without clipping, cool desaturated midtones",
    "finish": "ultra-detailed, photoreal, campaign quality"
  },

  "negative_prompt": "blood, gore, wounds, violence, menacing or aggressive expression, exposed skin emphasis, sexualized framing, plastic skin, airbrushed wax skin, AI doll face, blown-out clipped highlights, flat white feather blob, oversaturation, busy background, text, watermark, distorted hands, extra fingers, fused fingers, deformed or melted blade, cheap costume feathers, fake plastic feathers, 3D render, cartoon, illustration",

  "render_notes": "Photoreal. The sword reads as an elegant ceremonial art-object made of faceted clear/white diamond or ice — crystalline and glassy, NOT metallic or weaponlike-threatening. Calm, mythic, luminous mood. Feathers fully cover the form. High-key palette must keep real texture in skin and feathers — bright, never washed-out or sterile."
}
